overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a luxurious neon-lit rooftop lounge, pausing at a balcony overlooking a rainy Night City street, then continuing through the lounge and down a long corridor lined with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale rooftop lounge with color-changing wall panels

events.description: wall panels shift from yellow to red illumination
wall panels shift from red to pink and magenta
approaching glass railing at balcony edge with city view becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge toward the balcony overlooking the city

entered.detail: large square panels on walls cycling through yellow, red, and pink neon colors
highly polished dark floor reflecting neon lights and surroundings
black curved sofas and chairs with purple neon underlighting
transparent glass barrier marking the balcony edge
tall green plants in metallic planters

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a futuristic rooftop lounge with color-changing neon wall panels shifting from yellow to red to pink. The space features reflective marble floors, modern black furniture with purple underglow, and potted plants. A few patrons are seated as the camera approaches the glass railing overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony overlook with aerial view of Night City street

events.description: reaching balcony railing and looking down at street level
rain visible falling outside the glass barrier
turning away from balcony view to re-enter the lounge

agents.ego_description: standing at balcony railing looking down at the city street and traffic below

entered.detail: aerial view of street with moving vehicles and illuminated signs below
large holographic advertisement on building facade across the street
rain falling outside the glass barrier in the night air

segments.scene_description: The player stands at the balcony edge overlooking Night City, with rain visible falling outside the glass barrier. The view shows street traffic and a large Kiroshi billboard on a distant building. After observing the cityscape, the camera turns back toward the lounge interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge interior with bar area and prominent holographic advertisements

events.description: wall panels shift to green and blue illumination
passing by bar area with large 'Watson Whore' billboard visible
turning toward the exit corridor lined with neon frames

agents.ego_description: walking back through the lounge past seated patrons and standing NPCs toward the exit

notable_agents.action: group of three seated patrons conversing on curved sofa
standing patron in red outfit gesturing with hands raised

entered.detail: large pink holographic advertisement with bold text on glass wall
long black bar with neon accents and stools
cyan glowing rectangular frames marking the exit corridor entrance

segments.scene_description: The player walks back through the lounge where the wall panels now glow green and blue. The camera passes a group of NPCs conversing on sofas and approaches a bar area featuring a prominent 'Watson Whore' holographic billboard. A patron in red stands gesturing as the camera turns toward a corridor entrance marked by cyan neon frames.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor with sequential neon light frames and holographic advertisements

events.description: entering long corridor with repeating cyan neon door frames
passing green 'ALL FOODS' advertisement on left wall
beginning descent on slight downward ramp in corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor toward the exit, passing various advertisements and occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in orange dress standing near wall looking at phone

entered.detail: green holographic advertisement with red text reading 'ALL FOODS'
purple advertisement with female figure and text 'FEEL THE CITY'
slight downward slope in corridor floor leading to lower level

segments.scene_description: The player enters a long corridor marked by repeating cyan neon rectangular frames. The walls display various holographic advertisements including 'ALL FOODS' and 'FEEL THE CITY'. The corridor slopes gently downward as the camera continues walking, passing a woman in an orange dress and other pedestrians, with the neon frames creating a tunnel-like effect leading toward the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a luxurious rooftop lounge that eventually transitions into a neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins by moving across reflective marble floors and past color-changing wall panels shifting from yellow to pink, before approaching a glass railing that overlooks the rainy streets and distant billboards of Night City. As the camera turns back toward the interior, the lighting shifts to green and blue hues, leading the viewer past conversing patrons and a holographic bar advertisement. The scene then expands into a long, downward-sloping corridor defined by repeating cyan neon frames and holographic ads for food and city life. Finally, the camera continues its descent through this tunnel-like space, passing pedestrians in vibrant attire toward the exit.
